examples: The rosebush is putting out new shoots.
Passed by a beautiful rosebush house. I like it.
There is a rosebush near the fence and it is very beautiful.
The beauty of a lavender rosebush is sure to be KO'd by a patch of orange nasturtiums and scarlet cannas showboating nearby.
The text message you receive from your rosebush, in this case, is really an invitation to a smarter world, a world where ordinary objects are transformed and enlightened so they can serve you better.
